quicksight.analysis.scatterplotfieldwell:
The field well configuration of a scatter plot.

This is a union type structure. For this structure to be valid, only one of the attributes can be defined.

quicksight.analysis.scatterplotfieldwell.Description: The aggregated field wells of a scatter plot. The x and y-axes of scatter plots with aggregated field wells are aggregated by category, label, or both.
The unaggregated field wells of a scatter plot. The x and y-axes of these scatter plots are unaggregated.
